name: 【出品】03_171-コマース-LP自動生成-Shopify-eBay出品_V5

parameters.query: SELECT extraction_id, video_url, channel_id, products_data, product_count, target_platforms FROM video_product_extractions WHERE extraction_id = $1

INSERT INTO generated_listings (extraction_id, product_index, product_data, ebay_listing, shopify_product, status, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3::jsonb, $4::jsonb, $5::jsonb, 'draft', NOW()) RETURNING listing_id

nodes.name: 🔐 HMAC署名検証
nodes.notes: [EMPIRE_OS_V6] セキュリティ強制挿入

meta.description: N3-171 LP自動生成 V5-PRODUCTION - 抽出商品からeBay/Shopify出品データを自動生成
